channel.title: close encounters — upcoming approaches
channel.description: Near-Earth objects forecast to pass close to Earth in the next 60 days. Sourced from NASA JPL CNEOS.

item.title: 2026 JC4 — 2026-05-22 — 14.91 LD
item.description: Approach: 2026-05-22T19:21:00+00:00; distance 14.907 LD; velocity 21.3 km/s; orbit class APO; apparent magnitude ~17.4; visible: large telescope
